rationale.sub-04: Low SCI minimum and 10 channels below the 0.75 threshold, but median SCI remains high enough for review instead of automatic exclusion.
rationale.sub-05: Very poor fNIRS quality with median SCI around 0.149 and 26 channels below the 0.75 threshold.
rationale.sub-09: Borderline 22-channel cohort subject with 8 channels below the 0.75 threshold and lower median SCI than the clean cohort members.
rationale.sub-12: Very poor fNIRS quality with median SCI around 0.060 and all 22 channels below the 0.75 threshold.

notes: Use default_train_eval as the default pool for early baselines and ablations.
Keep stress_test_only subjects out of default training runs unless a correction path is explicitly being tested.
Treat borderline_review subjects as eligible, but always surface their per-subject metrics separately.
